response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack and distributed systems experience, particularly in high-scale environments like Stripe and Shopify, with exposure to AI-agent infrastructure. However, his background lacks explicit executive-level leadership in agentic AI or fintech, and his experience in regulated financial environments is limited. His entrepreneurial and open-source work shows initiative but doesn’t fully align with the role’s core requirements.
strengths: Proven experience in high-scale distributed systems and event-driven architectures at Stripe and Shopify.
Hands-on contributions to AI-agent infrastructure (e.g., MCP code generators) and tooling.
Strong technical breadth across multiple languages, frameworks, and domains (web, mobile, embedded).
concerns: No explicit executive leadership experience (e.g., CTO, VP Engineering) in scaling engineering teams to 30+ people.
Limited demonstrated experience with agentic AI in production (e.g., multi-agent frameworks, real-time inference).
Fintech experience is peripheral (e.g., pricing at Shopify) rather than core infrastructure (credit systems, risk modeling).
